nest_description: Valve Source dedicated servers including CS:GO, Team Fortress 2, and Garry's Mod.
name: CS:GO Dedicated Server
description: Counter-Strike: Global Offensive / CS2 Dedicated Server.
install_script: echo "Installing SteamCMD and CS:GO server files..." && mkdir -p csgo/cfg && echo "CS:GO installation finished."

config_files.template:
hostname "{{HOSTNAME}}"
rcon_password "{{RCON_PASSWORD}}"
sv_maxrate 0
sv_minrate 80000
mp_maxrounds 30
mp_timelimit 0
